step-001.title: Go module initialization and project scaffolding

step-002.title: Domain error types and value objects

history.detail: Feature state reconstructed from artifacts. No source code exists. Starting from step-001.
Step 001 implemented and approved. go.mod, go.sum, cmd/http-lambda/main.go created. go build and go vet pass.
Step 002 implemented and approved. Domain errors (ValidationError, ErrNotFound, ErrConcurrencyConflict, ErrDuplicate) and ProductType value object. 100% coverage.
Step 003 implemented and approved. Client, Asset, Position, ProcessedCommand entities with constructors, reconstitution, invariants, mutation methods. 52 tests, 100% coverage.
Step 004 implemented and approved. Repository port interfaces for all 4 entities plus UnitOfWork. Zero infrastructure imports.
Step 005 implemented and approved. Initial schema migration with all 4 tables, constraints, and indexes matching design.md exactly.
Step 006 implemented and approved. Platform database config with env-var loading, fail-fast validation, Lambda-appropriate defaults, and pgxpool creation. 100% coverage.

Step 007 implemented and approved. All 4 repository adapters, transaction runner, DBTX helpers. 5 compile-time interface checks. 21 integration tests. Error translation for ErrNotFound, ErrConcurrencyConflict, ErrDuplicate.
All 7 steps implemented, reviewed, and approved. Domain foundation feature complete.
